Welcome to Ixchel-Balam

Some days you don't need to produce, perform, or prove anything. You just need a place that was built with you in mind. This is that place.

Your Day Pass Includes

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

01
Grounds Access

Full access to all sanctuary common areas — pool, hot tub, tea bar, co-working space, and lush outdoor areas.

02
Anchored Events

Attend curated wellness offerings and gatherings hosted on property. Check availability at booking.

03
Light Refreshments

Fresh fruit, aguas frescas, infused waters, and sweet treats — nourishment included throughout your visit.

"Settle in. There is no rush here."

The Grounds

Your Space
to Arrive

Ixchel-Balam is a luxury wellness sanctuary in the heart of Mérida, built intentionally for Black Women and women of color to soften, exhale, and remember themselves. Every detail was chosen with deep care and reverence for you.

  • Pool & Hot Tub
  • Tea Bar
  • Co-Working Space
  • Wifi Access
  • Dining Area
  • Daily Anchored Events

For You, By Design

"You don't have to earn your rest here. You just have to show up."

Ixchel-Balam was built as a sanctuary where Black Women are the center — not an afterthought. Come as you are. Leave restored.
